playerContract.fantasy: Tune a suspended cathedral mobile until three weighted bowls sing in exact balance.
playerContract.heroVerb: shift and settle a physical counterweight
playerContract.qualityBar: Preserve the diagnostics-closed loop, deterministic endpoint state, validated feel scores, and one Canvas/DOM owner.
requiredProof: enter and understand with Advanced closed
zero console messages and bounded runtime metrics

candidateDecision.selectionReason: The responsibility means translating authoritative body facts into the receiving weighted-source vocabulary. Weighted Trigger owns source ingestion and aggregation; Physics Body Lite remains the read-only fact provider. A sibling integration kit under weighted-source-ingestion preserves that dependency direction without making either endpoint own the other's lifecycle.

owns: read one canonical Physics Body Lite body by id
map body id, position, and mass to one Weighted Trigger source upsert
replace the same source id idempotently
doesNotOwn: reset, snapshots, events, rendering, input, scene content, or presentation
invariants: source id equals authoritative body id
position and mass come from the same canonical body snapshot
repeated projection replaces rather than duplicates
missing bodies fail explicitly without manufacturing state
the adapter does not call engine.tick

plausible: a cargo or vehicle mass-sensor host

kitUsageLedger.meaning: authoritative lightweight body position, mass, velocity, friction, and collision facts
weighted source ingestion, spatial aggregation, and activation facts

ownershipMatrix.responsibility: body position, mass, velocity, and friction
weighted sources, aggregation, activation, and release
decide when a stone becomes settled
render, input, audio, diagnostics, and proof

adapterAndHostExclusions: authored stones, bowls, rail tuning, and exact-win policy
diagnostics, telemetry collection, and evidence capture

ambiguityAndOverlapLedger.question: Should projection remain local or enter reusable taxonomy?
ambiguityAndOverlapLedger.decision: Select one stateless integration-kit node under weighted-source-ingestion because the seam is deterministic, idempotent, absent from Core and ProtoKits, and has three plausible consumer families.
ambiguityAndOverlapLedger.remainingGate: Engine-domain consolidation must confirm the namespace, API, and dependency contract before promotion.

ambiguityAndOverlapLedger.question: Does the projection kit own engine.tick?
ambiguityAndOverlapLedger.decision: No. Tick scheduling remains with the existing Core/application lifecycle so the adapter does not couple endpoint lifecycles.
ambiguityAndOverlapLedger.remainingGate: Consolidation must keep the behavior API command-only and stateless.

ambiguityAndOverlapLedger.question: Does the reusable boundary own the settled decision?
ambiguityAndOverlapLedger.decision: No. Settled is authored application policy; the reusable boundary only projects a body after the caller chooses to invoke it.
ambiguityAndOverlapLedger.remainingGate: Migration must preserve the route's explicit settled flags and outcome policy.

ambiguityAndOverlapLedger.question: Do syncStone and settle represent two owners?
ambiguityAndOverlapLedger.decision: They are duplicate local implementations of one semantic mapping, not two capabilities.
ambiguityAndOverlapLedger.remainingGate: Retain both until a promoted successor exists and migration parity passes.

recommendedConsolidationCandidates.scope: Only the stateless body snapshot to weight-source upsert behavior.
entryGate: reconcile against the current ProtoKits domain atlas and package exports
freeze one command-only API and capability namespace
preserve endpoint lifecycle ownership and application settled policy
do not implement, migrate, or purge during consolidation

currentRunParity.timingAssessment: The local headed browser remained compositor-capped near 30 FPS and is not comparable to the authoritative 60.26 FPS baseline. Runtime files are byte-identical, so change-induced primary-metric regression is 0%.

unresolvedGaps: The taxonomy-selected integration kit has not been consolidated against the live ProtoKits domain atlas.
No reusable behavior implementation or consumer migration is authorized yet.
The preserved playable remains the parity owner and is not purge-eligible.
Pre-existing active-play overlay cards remain visual debt; resolve them before any new player-visible feature or derived experiment.
nextStageEntryGate: Use this taxonomy export as the sole intake.
Confirm one command-only API, namespace, dependencies, exclusions, and at least two plausible consumers.
Do not implement promotion, migrate consumers, purge the playable, or derive a new experiment.
